subject: الرياضيات
notes: MOE library mislabeling: this content is served under file ID 3407 even though the cover says 'Arabic Grade 5'. Actual content is Math Grade 7 Sem 2 Part 2 (Units 5-8). Note: Math G7 Sem 2 Part 1 (the predecessor book with Units 1-4) appears unavailable in the MOE digital library.
